prompt: Today's Run 3 is done. I want to create a new versioned deployment of the web app so the stable URL serves the new code.

assertions.text: Response runs 'clasp push --force' before deploying (push before deploy)
Response includes 'clasp deploy --description' with a date-stamped description (e.g. yyyy-MM-dd format or $(Get-Date ...) expression)
Response clarifies that the web app URL stays stable and only the version number changes
